name: GolfCave
about: GolfCave is a 24/7 indoor golf facility that provides golfers of all skill levels with private simulator bays, referred to as 'Caves,' for practice and play. It utilizes TrackMan technology, a premium golf simulator known for its accuracy, offering a range of features including course play, data analysis, and coaching options. The venue promotes a flexible, self-directed experience where members can access facilities at any time, and also offers services like club fittings with Club Champion and hosts various tournaments and events.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access allows for practice at any convenient time
Private 'Caves' provide a comfortable and undisturbed environment
TrackMan technology offers precise, data-driven feedback for improvement

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB (Bring Your Own Food) is permitted.
BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) is permitted.

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium, dual-camera system providing accurate ball and club tracking.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you must bring your own golf clubs to use at GolfCave.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, GolfCave operates on a BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) policy. You are welcome to bring your own food and drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time required to play 18 holes is not specified on the website.

faq.question: Is GolfCave kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is kid-friendly. It mentions family nights and is used for training and practice for children who play competitively.
